# Virtual Freaks

> Virtual Freaks is a remote talent marketplace where businesses hire skilled virtual professionals — developers, designers, virtual assistants, marketers, and more. Free for employers. No commissions. No service fees.

## About
Virtual Freaks (virtualfreaks.co) is a modern alternative to Upwork, Fiverr, and OnlineJobs.ph. Founded to make hiring remote talent simple, transparent, and free for employers.

## Key Features
- Free for employers — no subscriptions, no commissions, no service fees
- Verified talent profiles with portfolios, video intros, and skill badges
- Direct messaging between employers and freelancers
- Built-in hire tracking and review system
- Job board for employers to post remote positions
- Founding member program for early adopters
- Leaderboard showcasing top talent

## Talent Categories
Development, Design, Marketing, Virtual Assistance, Content Writing, Video Editing, Data Entry, Customer Support, Project Management, SEO, Social Media Management, Bookkeeping, Sales, and more.

## How It Works
1. Employers browse talent profiles or post jobs
2. Connect directly with freelancers — no middleman
3. Hire and track work through the platform
4. Leave reviews after completed projects

## Links
- Homepage: https://virtualfreaks.co
- Browse Talent: https://virtualfreaks.co/browse
- Job Board: https://virtualfreaks.co/jobs
- FAQ: https://virtualfreaks.co/faq
- About: https://virtualfreaks.co/about
- Create Employer Account: https://virtualfreaks.co/register?role=employer
- Create Freelancer Profile: https://virtualfreaks.co/register?role=seeker
